# Contributing to ZeroRoomLab-manifest

This repo is a living document. PRs and issues welcome.

## Translation contributions

See [docs/TRANSLATION_GUIDE.md](../docs/TRANSLATION_GUIDE.md)
for style rules before submitting EN translations.

## Fork policy

All docs here are CC-BY 4.0 unless otherwise noted.
Fork freely. Credit ZeroRoomLab / @K_chachamaru.

## What NOT to submit

- Personal information of any kind
- Internal credential documents
- Anything from the CCUS or business operation files
